    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class tailFinder.Main
    Launches the JavaFX application.
    Main - Class in tailFinder
    Main entry point for the TailFinder game application.
    Main() - Constructor for class tailFinder.Main
     
    MainMenuPane - Class in tailFinder.view.menu
    Main menu screen for the TailFinder game.
    MainMenuPane() - Constructor for class tailFinder.view.menu.MainMenuPane
    Initializes the main menu pane with background and menu buttons.
    makeSound(int) - Method in interface tailFinder.infra.MakeSoundAble
    Plays a sound effect based on the provided selector index.
    makeSound(int) - Method in class tailFinder.model.block.passable.SlimePane
    Plays the slime sound effect (ignores selector parameter).
    makeSound(int) - Method in class tailFinder.model.block.solid.StevePane
    Plays a sound effect for the player character.
    makeSound(int) - Method in class tailFinder.view.game.WinLossAlertPane
    Plays the win/victory sound effect (ignores selector parameter).
    makeSound(int) - Method in class tailFinder.view.menu.button.BaseMenuButton
    Plays the button press sound effect (ignores selector parameter).
    MakeSoundAble - Interface in tailFinder.infra
    Interface for objects that can produce sound effects.
    makeWalkNoise - Static variable in class tailFinder.logic.SteveWalkLogic

    media - Static variable in class tailFinder.logic.SoundLogic

    MenuButtonVbox - Class in tailFinder.view.menu
    Vertical box container for main menu buttons.
